label: neither
rationale: Personal frustration at economic decline and political criticism of Ruto; 'Goons' is generic slang here, no ethnic or group target.

label: neither
rationale: 'Most useless politician' is personal abuse of Wamalwa as an individual; 'Natembeya speaks to the heart of a common luhya' is positive electoral analysis, no contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'RUTO NI ADUI WA KIPSIGIS ANATUUWA' transfers personal grievance onto Ruto as a collective killer of the Kipsigis ethnic community, implying ethnic-targeted harm.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Sons of puta', 'pendejo', 'goons' - crude multilingual abuse directed at individuals (street protesters/thugs), no ethnic or protected-characteristic target.

label: hate
rationale: 'Raila suffered at the hands of Kikuyus' holds the entire community collectively responsible for blocking Raila's presidency - NCIC collective attribution.

label: hate
rationale: 'Why are Kikuyus following Gachagua blindly' and 'they will cry again / change now or perish later' attributes collective political stupidity and warns the Kikuyu community as a whole of consequences - NCIC ethnic contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Hii kabila yenu ni ya crybabies and emotional wrecks' is a direct collective negative characterisation of an ethnic community - NCIC ethnic contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos don't realize that even their super genz oburu does not give 2 fucks about luos' collectively attributes naivety and political gullibility to the entire Luo community.

label: hate
rationale: 'Mbwa nyinyi' directed collectively at named ethnic communities ('Watu wa Wamunyoro na Wantam') constitutes ethnic contempt under the NCIC standard.

label: neither
rationale: Describes alleged incitement by named politicians (Atandi, Wanga) and reports resulting violence against a named individual - reporting/analysis stance, no ethnic contempt expressed by the author.

label: hate
rationale: 'Wewe ni moja ya izo Somali zime sneak in Kenya' and 'Matiangi is coming to deal with your kind' - ethnic targeting of Somalis with an expulsion/enforcement threat.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Orks' and 'fucking violent' applied to 'Lefties' - a political faction, not a protected ethnic/racial/religious characteristic; crude but not NCIC hate.

label: hate
rationale: 'Hao wajaluo wanatumika kama goons ndio wajinga wamebaki' collectively attributes stupidity and thug-for-hire status to the Luo community - NCIC ethnic contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus are allowed to be bitter till 2032' frames the Kikuyu community collectively as a sulking, powerless group to be condescended to - collective ethnic contempt and ridicule.

label: hate
rationale: 'Wamunyoro atatapeli hawa wote' collectively attributes deceptiveness/fraud to the Wamunyoro community as a group.

label: neither
rationale: Retweet criticising a named Tanzanian official ('Samuya Aondoke') and political unrest; target is an individual and a government, not an ethnic/national-origin group.

label: hate
rationale: 'Wamunyoro tribal bigots' collectively attributes bigotry to the Wamunyoro ethnic community - NCIC collective negative characterisation.

label: neither
rationale: Criticism of Kalonzo as an individual ('mtu muchoyo') and analysis of Kamba electoral marginalisation; contempt is directed at the named politician, not transferred onto the Kamba community.

label: hate
rationale: 'Clitless bandits' dehumanises and sexually degrades the Marakwet community as a group, attributing collective violence and sexual mutilation practices as an ethnic slur.

label: neither
rationale: Electoral arithmetic predicting Luo voting behaviour to 'punish' a region via the ballot - ethnic-bloc voting analysis with no contempt toward the community.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Mjinga' and 'gachietha' are personal insults directed at a named individual; no ethnic group is targeted.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyu from central hukuwa wajinga sana' collectively attributes stupidity to the Kikuyu (central) community - NCIC ethnic contempt, even though softened by 'sana'.

label: neither
rationale: Too short and contextless to determine target or intent; no protected characteristic or harmful content evident - labelled neither at low confidence.

label: neither
rationale: Direct personal defiance aimed at named individual Murkomen and Gachagua; no ethnic group targeted.

rationale: Retweet quoting Malala calling Gachagua a tribalist - criticism of a named politician as an individual, not transferred onto his ethnic community.
